name: Kotak Solitaire Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: 10 Air Miles / ₹100 spent on travel bookings via Kotak Unbox

domestic: Unlimited domestic lounge access for primary and add-on cardholders.
Guest access: 2 complimentary domestic lounge visits per primary cardholder per year.
international: Unlimited international lounge access via Priority Pass for primary and add-on cardholders.
Guest access: 2 complimentary international lounge visits per primary cardholder per year.

additionalBenefits: Crafted in metal for primary and add-on cardholders
Kotak Solitaire Table: 20% off up to ₹5,000 twice a month on bookings via District by Zomato
Complimentary Zomato Gold membership for a full year at ₹1
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between ₹400 and ₹7,500 (max ₹10,000 per anniversary year)

salaried: Invite-only for Kotak Solitaire Program customers
selfEmployed: Invite-only for Kotak Solitaire Program customers

internalNotes: No air miles are earned on international transactions despite zero forex markup. 1 Air Mile = Rs 1.0 for Kotak Unbox travel bookings, and Rs 0.50 for other voucher redemptions. Minimum 2,00,000 Air Miles not required, minimum 2,000 Air Miles required for partner miles transfer.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
